t: A text belonging to the Instructor. The so[ng accompanying the sacrifice on the fourth Sabbath, sung on] the twenty-[fifth] of [the first mo]nth.
[…] when they come with the godlike beings of
[…] together for all of their assemblies
the king[dom of …] with all the ch[iefs of …]
[…] their mi[ght] for all the powerful warriors
the King of the god[like beings …]

[…] for all the rebellious councils […]



## Frags. 3–4
